flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Haywood Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (14.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Haywood Community College fell 43% between 2013 and 2016 ($7.6k → $4.3k).
